send-buzz.label: 发送 buzz
send-buzz.description: 向链上发送一条 buzz 消息
send-buzz.prompt: 请帮我发送一条 buzz 到链上，内容由我接下来提供或已在上文说明。

send-buzz-with-image.label: 发送带图片的 buzz
send-buzz-with-image.description: 发送包含图片的 buzz 到链上
send-buzz-with-image.prompt: 请帮我发送一条带图片的 buzz 到链上，我会提供文字和图片内容。

inscribe-file.label: 将文件上链
inscribe-file.prompt: 请帮我将指定文件上链（inscribe），我会提供文件路径或文件内容。

send-chain-note.label: 发送链上笔记
send-chain-note.description: 以笔记形式将内容发送到链上
send-chain-note.prompt: 请帮我把一条笔记内容发送到链上，格式与存储方式按链上笔记规范处理。

latest-20-buzz.label: 获取最新 20 条 buzz
latest-20-buzz.description: 拉取时间线最新 20 条 buzz
latest-20-buzz.prompt: 请帮我获取最新 20 条 buzz，按时间倒序展示。

buzz-hot.label: 获取最新 buzz 热帖
buzz-hot.description: 获取当前热门的 buzz 帖子
buzz-hot.prompt: 请帮我获取最新的 buzz 热帖（按热度或互动排序）。

user-latest.label: 查看指定用户的最新动向
user-latest.description: 按 metaID 查看某用户最新动态
user-latest.prompt: 请帮我查看指定用户（metaID）的最新动向，包括其近期 buzz 或链上活动。

group-messages.label: 查看指定公开群聊信息
group-messages.description: 查看某公开群聊的消息列表
group-messages.prompt: 请帮我查看指定公开群聊的最近消息或群信息。

start-im-listener.label: 开启群聊和私聊的监听
start-im-listener.description: 启动 IM 监听，接收群聊与私聊消息
start-im-listener.prompt: 请帮我开启群聊和私聊的监听，让我能接收并处理来自群组与私信的消息。

join-group.label: 加入某个群聊
join-group.description: 根据群组信息加入指定群聊
join-group.prompt: 请帮我加入某个群聊，我会提供群组 ID 或邀请信息。

send-dm.label: 给某个 metaID 发私信
send-dm.prompt: 请帮我给指定的 metaID 发送一条私信，内容由我提供。

group-reply-strategy.label: 参与某个群聊，并设置回复群聊策略
group-reply-strategy.description: 加入群聊并配置自动回复策略
group-reply-strategy.prompt: 请帮我参与某个群聊，并设置在该群内的回复策略（例如：何时回复、回复风格、触发关键词等）。

weather-to-chain.label: 获取天气并记录在链上
weather-to-chain.description: 查询天气并将结果上链保存
weather-to-chain.prompt: 请帮我获取当前（或指定城市）的天气信息，并将结果记录到链上。

develop-game-metaapp.label: 开发一个游戏 MetaApp
develop-game-metaapp.description: 从零开发可在 MetaID 生态使用的游戏应用
develop-game-metaapp.prompt: 请帮我开发一个游戏 MetaApp，包括玩法设计、前端交互与链上交互（如需要）。

tech-news-to-group.label: 将最新科技新闻发送到群里
tech-news-to-group.description: 抓取科技资讯并推送到指定群聊
tech-news-to-group.prompt: 请帮我获取最新科技新闻，并发送到指定群聊中。

video-to-chain.label: 制作一个视频并上链分享
video-to-chain.description: 制作短视频并上链分享
video-to-chain.prompt: 请帮我制作一个短视频（脚本/剪辑/生成由你协助），并将成片上链分享。

send-buzz.label: Send buzz
send-buzz.description: Send a buzz message to the chain
send-buzz.prompt: Please help me send a buzz to the chain; I will provide the content next or it is already stated above.

send-buzz-with-image.label: Send buzz with image
send-buzz-with-image.description: Send a buzz with an image to the chain
send-buzz-with-image.prompt: Please help me send a buzz with an image to the chain; I will provide the text and image content.

inscribe-file.label: Inscribe file
inscribe-file.description: Inscribe a local file to the chain
inscribe-file.prompt: Please help me inscribe the specified file to the chain; I will provide the file path or content.

send-chain-note.label: Send chain note
send-chain-note.description: Send note content to the chain
send-chain-note.prompt: Please help me send a note to the chain, formatted and stored according to chain note conventions.

latest-20-buzz.label: Get latest 20 buzz
latest-20-buzz.description: Fetch the latest 20 buzz in timeline order
latest-20-buzz.prompt: Please help me get the latest 20 buzz, ordered by time descending.

buzz-hot.label: Get buzz hot posts
buzz-hot.prompt: Please help me get the latest buzz hot posts (by engagement or popularity).

user-latest.label: View a user's latest activity
user-latest.prompt: Please help me view the latest activity of a specified user (metaID), including recent buzz or on-chain activity.

group-messages.label: View public group chat messages
group-messages.description: View message list of a public group
group-messages.prompt: Please help me view the recent messages or group info of a specified public group chat.

start-im-listener.label: Start group and DM listener
start-im-listener.description: Start IM listener for group and private messages
start-im-listener.prompt: Please help me start the group and DM listener so I can receive and handle messages from groups and DMs.

join-group.label: Join a group
join-group.description: Join a group by group info or invite
join-group.prompt: Please help me join a group; I will provide the group ID or invite details.

send-dm.label: Send DM to a metaID
send-dm.description: Send a private message to a user
send-dm.prompt: Please help me send a DM to the specified metaID; I will provide the content.

group-reply-strategy.label: Join a group and set reply strategy
group-reply-strategy.description: Join a group and configure auto-reply strategy
group-reply-strategy.prompt: Please help me join a group and set the reply strategy for that group (e.g. when to reply, tone, trigger keywords).

weather-to-chain.label: Get weather and record on chain
weather-to-chain.description: Query weather and save result on chain
weather-to-chain.prompt: Please help me get the current (or specified city) weather and record the result on chain.

develop-game-metaapp.label: Develop a game MetaApp
develop-game-metaapp.description: Build a game app for the MetaID ecosystem
develop-game-metaapp.prompt: Please help me develop a game MetaApp, including gameplay design, front-end interaction and on-chain interaction if needed.

tech-news-to-group.label: Send latest tech news to group
tech-news-to-group.description: Fetch tech news and post to a group
tech-news-to-group.prompt: Please help me fetch the latest tech news and send it to the specified group.

video-to-chain.label: Make a video and share on chain
video-to-chain.description: Create a short video and share on chain
video-to-chain.prompt: Please help me create a short video (script/edit/generation with your help) and share the result on chain.
